name: Full Info Given At Once
description: User provides all key info in one message. Agent should extract and ask only for what's missing.

turns.user: Hey Ahmed here — identified a Critical issue in PayFlow (Finance web app, Q1 Security Audit Feb 1–28, 2025, DAST Feb 10–25) SQL Injection vulnerability in the login endpoint allows attackers to bypass authentication and access sensitive financial data. Please log it for Feb 15th.
